subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Sun of Truth! The perfumed letter was read, and from its contents joy and gladness were obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان نیر حقیقت نامه مشکین تلاوت گردید و از مضامین فرح و مسرت حاصل شد
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love and unity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
